targets.query:
from(bucket: "homelab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "snmp_device")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type == "palo-alto")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pan_session_utilization")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "homelab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "snmp_device")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type == "palo-alto")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /pan_session_active.*/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "homelab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "snmp_interface_hc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device_type == "palo-alto")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /if_hc_(in|out)_octets/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
